channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Andrew Luck returns to Stanford as the GM of the football program
item.description: Andrew Luck is returning to Stanford in hopes of turning around a struggling football program that he once helped become a national power.
item.dc:creator: Josh Dubow, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: TEXANS NEWSLETTER: Recovering from disaster
item.description: Texans look to bounce back after tough loss to Titans as they face the Jaguars in a crucial AFC South matchup.
item.dc:creator: Ari Alexander, Holly Galvan Posey, KPRC 2

item.title: Texas A&M superfan proposes to girlfriend during ESPN's 'College GameDay' ahead of rivalry game vs. Texas
item.description: Two Texas A&M Aggie superfans got engaged after a surprise proposal during a segment on ESPN's "College GameDay" on Saturday before the Aggies play Texas on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lando Norris hands Oscar Piastri the win in Qatar F1 sprint, defying McLaren orders
item.description: Lando Norris ignored team orders as he handed his McLaren teammate Oscar Piastri the win the sprint race at the Qatar Grand Prix in a one-two finish for the team.
item.dc:creator: James Ellingworth, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: What to know before Cal kicks off against No. 9 SMU
item.description: SMU won the only previous meeting, beating a one-win Cal team 13-7 at Berkeley on Sept. 21, 1957. A year later, the Bears played in their most recent Rose Bowl game.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Faraudo, The Mercury News

item.title: Who is Blaire Fleming? SJSU volleyball player dominating female rivals and enraging women's rights groups
item.description: San Jose State volleyball player Blaire Fleming will play for a conference championship at the center of a political firestorm over transgender inclusion.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Marley magic: Pittsburg defeats San Ramon Valley in NCS Division I title game behind clutch play from quarterback Marley Alcantara
item.description: NCS Division I football championship: Pittsburg quarterback Marley Alcantara leads Pittsburg to fourth consecutive Division I title with 35-28 win over San Ramon Valley.
item.dc:creator: Nathan Canilao, The Mercury News

item.title: Utes close disappointing season with 28-14 victory
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (ABC4 Sports) - Utah forced three turnovers and scored two defensive touchdowns Friday night, including a 60-yard pick-6 by Zemaiah Vaughn, as the Utes snapped a seven-game losing streak with a 28-14 victory over UCF.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: USU wins NIT season tip-off over North Texas, 61-57
item.description: ORLANDO (ABC4 Sports) - A career-best scoring performance from Mason Falslev helped lead Utah State men’s basketball (7-0, 0-0 MW) to a championship game title at the NIT Season Tip-Off Friday evening, as the Aggies defeated North Texas 61-57 at the ESPN Wide World of Sports Complex.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: BYU knocks off NC State in third place game, 72-61
item.description: SAN DIEGO, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - BYU got back in the win column with a 72-61 win over NC State on Thursday afternoon at the Rady Children’s Invitational at LionTree Arena in San Diego, Calif.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: No. 6 Georgia rallies to beat Georgia Tech 44-42 in eighth overtime, bolsters playoff hopes
item.description: ATHENS, Ga. (AP) — Freshman Nate Frazier ran for a 2-point conversion in the eighth overtime of a marathon for the ages after No. 6 Georgia pulled off an improbable fourth-quarter comeback, giving the Bulldogs a 44-42 victory over Georgia Tech on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: PAUL NEWBERRY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Chiefs recover botched snap by Raiders in closing seconds, clinch playoff berth with 19-17 victory
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — The Kansas City Chiefs have made a habit of winning games in the most improbable of ways. The way they beat the Raiders on Friday still had Patrick Mahomes and Co. shaking their heads in disbelief.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tommy Edman agrees to $74 million, 5-year contract with Dodgers after helping win World Series
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Tommy Edman and the Los Angeles Dodgers agreed Friday to a $74 million, five-year contract. His new deal contains a team option for 2030 and includes $25 million deferred over 10 years. The agreement supersedes a $16.5 million, two-year contract he agreed to with St.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Colorado State advances to MW volleyball final and will take the court against San Jose State
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Colorado State coach Emily Kohan said her team will take the floor rather than become the latest team to forfeit against San Jose State after the top-seeded Rams advanced to the Mountain West volleyball tournament final on Friday.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jon Batiste, Ledisi, Trombone Shorty and Lauren Daigle to perform during Super Bowl pregame
item.description: The Super Bowl pregame will have some Louisiana flavor: Multi-talented performer Jon Batiste will hit the stage to sing the national anthem, while Trombone Shorty and Lauren Daigle are slated to perform “America the Beautiful.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN LANDRUM Jr., Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Chicago looks to break Boston's 6-game win streak
item.description: Boston Celtics (15-3, second in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (8-12, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Friday, 8 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Chicago visits Minnesota after Hall's hat trick
item.description: Chicago Blackhawks (8-12-2, in the Central Division) vs. Minnesota Wild (14-4-4, in the Central Division) Saint Paul, Minnesota; Friday, 2 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Los Angeles area grad on life support after suffering head injury in college football game
item.description: A graduate of a Los Angeles County high school is on life support after suffering a serious head injury during a college football game last month. His school had mistakenly announced he had died Tuesday. According to KTLA affiliate WHNT in Huntsville, Alabama, 20-year-old Medrick Burnett Jr.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Jets management turns sights to 2025
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- The Jets are a 3 and 8 football team, getting set to host the Seahawks on Sunday. Gone is the head coach. Gone is the general manager. Owner Woody Johnson is running wild.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: Traffic citations against Dolphins' Tyreek Hill dismissed after officers no-show at hearing
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Traffic citations issued to Miami Dolphins star wide receiver Tyreek Hill after a September altercation with police have been dismissed after the charging officers didn’t attend a court hearing.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Lobos linemen purchase turkeys for families in need with NIL funds
item.description: Some of the players know how hard it can be to put food on the table, so they wanted to extend a hand up.
item.dc:creator: Melissa Torres, NewsNation

item.title: Rays must decide fate of stadium deal by Dec. 1, Pinellas commission chair says
item.description: The Pinellas County Commission is seeking answers from the Tampa Bay Rays organization on its embattled stadium deal.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Buccaneers QB Baker Mayfield seeks $12M in lawsuit against his father's company
item.description: An ongoing dispute between Tampa Bay Buccaneers quarterback Baker Mayfield and his family in Austin has boiled over into a lawsuit.
item.dc:creator: Billy Gates, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Utes out of bowl game contention after 31-28 loss
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Down to their fifth-string quarterback, the Utes football team almost pulled out a spectacular comeback against #22 Iowa State, only to lose its seventh straight game, 31-28.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
